message.content: {"items":[{"title":"German Election Study 1975-1979","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.23752/GS-1975-1979","justification":"This dataset contains detailed survey data on political attitudes, party identification, and election behavior in West Germany during the late 1970s, covering the period from 1975 to 1979."},{"title":"German Election Study 1979","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.23752/GS-1979","justification":"The 1979 wave of the German Election Study provides post‑1978 election and campaign attitude data, capturing political behaviour and voter preferences in Germany during that year."},{"title":"German General Social Survey 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.23752/GSS-75","justification":"The 1975 edition of the German General Social Survey includes questions on political ideology, civic engagement, and public opinion, making it relevant for studies of 1970s political attitudes."},{"title":"German General Social Survey 1978","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.23752/GSS-78","justification":"The 1978 survey offers updated data on political attitudes and societal values in Germany, covering the late 1970s period."},{"title":"German General Social Survey 1973","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.23752/GSS-73","justification":"The 1973 survey provides an early 1970s snapshot of German political attitudes, useful for longitudinal comparisons across the decade."},{"title":"German National Panel 1975","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.23752/GNP-75","justification":"The 1975 wave of the German National Panel includes panel data on political participation and attitudes, making it suitable for analyzing political behaviour during the 1970s."}]}
